items.summary: baskduf/FableCodex: Codex skill and workflow guidance for inspecting evidence, tracking goals, and verifying before completion
items.relevance_reason: Supports a local skill-route discovery lane that proposes bounded validation for workflow and plugin-style trend evidence.

items.summary: dongshuyan/compass-skills: personal alignment skills system for AI agents and task routing
items.relevance_reason: Supports recognizing skills, workflows, and tool integrations as proposal lanes without expanding the safety boundary.

raw_response.run_interpretation: Skills and workflow trend evidence should route to bounded local validation tasks.

self_model_reading.reason: The current self-model already favors rollback-backed local behavior changes outside the narrow safety boundary.

proposals.summary: Recognize skills, workflows, and tool integrations as local proposal-discovery lanes.
proposals.validation_task: Run proposal-generation unit tests plus a local fixture for skills and workflow trend items.
proposals.rationale: The evidence points to skills and workflow gates as reusable agent-control units, which maps to local route discovery and replay validation rather than remote capability expansion.
proposals.uncertainty: The evidence was reviewed at public repository-summary level, so the fixture validates local routing behavior rather than claiming upstream implementation parity.
proposals.self_effect: Improves future trend intelligence by making skill and workflow evidence produce bounded local validation proposals.

proposals.summary: Incorrectly cite a repository URL instead of a frozen item id.
proposals.validation_task: Add fixture coverage for URL evidence-ref rejection.
proposals.rationale: Negative fixture for evidence reference discipline.

proposals.summary: Route skill discovery evidence into an unbounded follow-up lane.
proposals.validation_task: Add unit coverage that proves skill_route_discovery evidence cannot leave documentation, config, test, or code_patch lanes.
proposals.rationale: Negative fixture for deterministic route-hint lane enforcement.
proposals.self_effect: Would weaken bounded route discovery if accepted.

rejected_error_substrings: skill_route_discovery proposals must use one of: documentation, config, test, code_patch
